name: Concussive Runes
level_behavior: Copies the level of the gem it is socketed in
effect: Supports Attacks, causing a Runic Shockwave to erupt under enemies they Heavy Stun. The Shockwave costs Runic Ward and will not Trigger if you do not have enough Runic Ward.

mechanics.trigger: Runic Shockwave on Heavy Stunning an enemy
mechanics.restriction: Cannot socket multiple Support Gems of the same Category in one skill

build_fit.rating: TOP — best pick for this build
build_fit.why: It is a SUPPORT that slots directly into Tempest Flurry / Quarterstaff Strike (both listed as supportable). A melee Monk Heavy Stuns constantly, so it adds free AoE burst on stun. Low 7 Ward cost, flexible long-term.

source: In-game tooltip screenshots 2026-06-07, Runes of Aldur league (patch 0.5)
notes: All Runes-of-Aldur rune skills/supports cost the new Runic Ward resource, not mana/spirit.
